summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Mock Testing Suite v3.0 - all backend APIs and frontend components working correctly

ui_bugs.issue: Modal overlay blocks navigation when not properly closed
ui_bugs.workaround: Use close button (X) instead of clicking outside modal

passed_tests: Backend API: GET /api/settings returns settings with setup_complete=true
Backend API: GET /api/settings/defaults returns call_types, shows, donors, tech_issues
Backend API: GET /api/history/stats returns stats object
Backend API: POST /api/session/start creates a session
Backend API: POST /api/session/call saves call data
Backend API: POST /api/gemini/summaries generates coaching and fail summaries
Backend API: POST /api/finish-session finalizes and moves to history
Frontend: Home page loads with Welcome greeting and navigation
Frontend: Basics page loads with Candidate Name, Headset, VPN, Browser fields
Frontend: Footer buttons (NC/NS, Not Ready, Stopped Responding, Tech Issue, Continue) all present
Frontend: Tech Issue button opens dialog with 5 checkboxes (Internet speed, Calls route, Script pop, Discord, Other)
Frontend: Calls page loads with Call Setup dropdowns, Scenario card, Payment cards, Pass/Fail buttons
Frontend: Settings page has 6 tabs all working (General, Gemini, Google Sheet, Calendar, Discord, Payment)
Frontend: Save Settings button present and functional
Frontend: History page shows search functionality
Frontend: Help page has tabs (Instructions, FAQ, Integrations, Troubleshooting)
Frontend: Sidebar navigation works for all pages (Home, Basics, Calls, Sup Transfer, Review, History, Settings, Help)
Frontend: Discord Post popup opens from sidebar link with templates
